skills.name: Hasisas
skills.description: Drink a Hasisas Potion and temporarily increase your physical ability. Increases attack speed and critical attack.
skills.effect_text:
Increases basic attack speed by CaptionRatio
Increases Critical damage by CaptionRatio3 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Behead
skills.description: Swing your dagger towards the enemy's neck. Attacked enemies will suffer from [Behead: Bleeding]. [Cloaking] does not disappear while dealing damage with [Behead: Bleeding]. In PvP, your character moves behind the enemy to attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Discover more
Coffee
Maps
Doll
Ignores 15% of enemy Defense
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Bleeding] Duration: 30 seconds

skills.name: Instant Acceleration
skills.description: Run towards distant enemies at incredible speed to instantly slash them.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Hallucination Smoke
skills.description: Release a hallucinatory smoke around you that reduces your enemies' evasion and accuracy, blocking their sight inside the range of the smoke.
skills.effect_text:
Evasion: - CaptionRatio %
Accuracy: - CaptionRatio %
Smoke Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Debuff Duration: 20 seconds

skills.name: Piercing Heart
skills.description: Pierce through the enemy's chest with your dagger. The attacked enemy's Defense is partially ignored, and the skill inflicts targets with the Heart Arrest debuff that renders them unable to restore HP.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Ignores 15% of enemy Defense
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Heart Arrest Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Annihilation
skills.description: Conceal yourself and quickly slash nearby enemies. You become invincible while the skill is being used.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 14
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Hasisas: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Hasisas]' basic attack speed and critical attack effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hasisas: Accelerate Reaction
attributes.description:
* Increases evasion by 20% while [Hasisas] is active

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Behead: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Behead] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Behead: Silencer
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Behead] will be afflicted with [Silence] debuff for 5 seconds

[Silence] duration reduced by half in PvP environments

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Behead: Deep Wound
attributes.description:
* Applies the Bleeding damage of [Behead] in proportion to the target's maximum HP but reduces the duration of [Behead: Bleeding] by 50%.

* Does not apply to boss monsters, and the amount of Bleeding will not exceed 5% of the caster's maximum HP

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Instant Acceleration: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Instant Acceleration] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Instant Acceleration: Stun
attributes.description:
* Stuns enemies affected by [Instant Acceleration] for 1 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Hallucination Smoke: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Hallucination Smoke]'s Evasion and Accuracy decrease effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Piercing Heart: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Piercing Heart] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Piercing Heart: Arrest Duration
attributes.description: * Increases the duration of [Piercing Heart]'s Heart Arrest debuff by 1 second per attribute level

attributes.name: Annihilation: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Annihilation] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Annihilation: Exit Scene
attributes.description:
* Maintains your stealth mode for 1 second per attribute level after using [Annihilation]

* Your movement speed increases by 5 while the stealth mode is maintained

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Annihilation: Intensify Wound
attributes.description:
* Applies twice the critical rate of [Annihilation] to bleeding enemies

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: [Arts] Hallucination Smoke: Commission to Kill
attributes.description:
* Applies [Assassination Target] debuff for 15 seconds to one enemy in the [Hallucination Smoke] range.

* Enemies inflicted with the [Assassination Target] debuff are prioritized for the teleportation effect of [Behead], and they take 10% more damage from the Assassin skill of the caster.

attributes.name: [Arts] Behead: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Behead] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Instant Acceleration: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Instant Acceleration] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Piercing Heart: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Piercing Heart] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Annihilation: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Annihilation] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Annihilation: High Speed
attributes.description:
* Does not become invincible

* Attacks the enemy 5 times faster than the original

* Attacks up to 10 enemy

* 1-second cooldown after casting in PVP area
